prestazioni: VK45DE (4.5L V8) engine: Full forged internals by JE Pistons (9.0:1 compression, 95mm bore) with Manley H-beam connecting rods and ACL Race Series bearings, paired with a custom Tomei 272° camshaft grind for optimized high-RPM power delivery (peak power at 7,200 RPM).

Forced induction via a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe by HKS, mated to a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom intercooler setup (GReddy Type-R front-mount, 11-row core) with silicone couplers by Vibrant Performance.

Fuel system upgrade: Dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pumps with a Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator, feeding ID1000x injectors (side-feed, VK45DE-specific) and a custom Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel capability (E85 compatible). Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (VQ/M-platform specific valving) and polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0115-K) for subframe reinforcement.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (M45-specific, bolt-on fenders with 30mm flares) paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter by Seibon and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser by Varis (VQ-platform compatible).

Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents on the grille, mirror caps, and lower bumper inserts, combined with a custom LED taillight conversion by Diode Dynamics (VK45DE-specific housing modifications).

Engine bay aesthetics: Custom carbon fiber VK45DE valve covers by Seibon, anodized gold hardware by ARP (studs, bolts), and a custom aluminum radiator support delete with a relocated overflow tank by Koyorad (M45-specific mounting brackets).
